message:
feat(cli): Add pagination, token budget, and new robot commands

Expand the robot/API interface with pagination support, token budgeting,
and new introspection commands for better AI agent integration.

New CLI Commands:
- `cass state`: Quick health/status check with staleness detection
  - Reports index freshness against configurable threshold (default 30min)
  - JSON output for robot consumption
  - Aliased from status for semantic clarity
- `cass api-version`: Show API and contract version info
  - Returns contract version, CLI version, feature flags
  - Enables agents to verify compatibility

Search Command Enhancements:
- `--max-tokens <N>`: Soft token budget for output (4 chars ≈ 1 token)
  - Automatically adjusts content truncation to fit budget
  - Prevents context overflow in AI agent pipelines
- `--request-id <ID>`: Echo request ID in _meta for correlation
  - Enables tracing through multi-agent workflows
  - Appears in robot JSON output for matching requests to responses
- `--cursor <base64>`: Cursor-based pagination for large result sets
  - Encodes offset/limit payload from previous result
  - Enables efficient iteration without offset drift

Contract Test Fixtures (tests/fixtures/cli_contract/):
- api_version.json: Expected API version response schema
- capabilities.json: Feature capability matrix
- introspect.json: Full API introspection snapshot (~35KB)
- Used for regression testing robot interface stability

Robot Test Expansion (tests/cli_robot.rs):
- +361 lines of comprehensive robot interface tests
- Coverage for new pagination, token budget, request-id features
- Contract version verification tests
- Error handling and edge case coverage

Implementation Details:
- DEFAULT_STALE_THRESHOLD_SECS constant (1800 = 30 minutes)
- CONTRACT_VERSION constant for API versioning
- Base64 cursor encoding using standard engine
- Clippy allow for large_enum_variant on Commands enum

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
